prompt: Create a gritty cinematic street-photography scene at night outside a jazz club, shot in a realistic documentary style with warm amber streetlights and high-ISO film grain. Three young women are sitting and lounging on a city sidewalk beside a brick wall: one woman is partially cropped at the far left with her back and black spaghetti-strap dress visible, one woman sits in the center wearing a sparkly dark sleeveless top and black pants with one arm lifted near her hair, and one woman sits against the brick wall on the right wearing a blue denim jacket over a black dress with her legs extended. Their faces are intentionally anonymized with soft rectangular blur blocks. In the background, show an illuminated neon club sign reading THE BLUE NOTE CLUB, glowing blue and pink above the sidewalk, with empty city streets, parked cars, street signs, dark buildings, and bokeh lights receding into the distance. Use a wide horizontal composition, 16:9 aspect ratio, eye-level candid angle, deep urban perspective, textured pavement, brick façade, moody nightlife atmosphere, natural imperfect posing, realistic shadows, warm color grading, and subtle lens flare from a bright streetlamp. The overall look should feel like a candid analog photo taken after a night out in a downtown American city, with warm sodium-vapor street lighting and neon glow.
